text.title: Benefits Realization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the benefits-realization methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: named_owner_business
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each benefit must have a named business-stakeholder owner — never the PM and never 'the team'.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `named-owner-business` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: baseline_before_golive
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Baseline measurement must be captured BEFORE go-live; post-hoc baselines are reconstructions, not measurements.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `baseline-before-golive` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: output_outcome_benefit
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Outputs (deliverables) must be distinguished from outcomes (behaviour change) from benefits (measured improvement); reporting must track all three separately.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `output-outcome-benefit` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: five_measurement_points
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each benefit must have ≥5 measurement points (M1, M3, M6, Y1, Y2) to detect decay.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `five-measurement-points` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: rag_thresholds
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: RAG must use fixed thresholds (Green ≥90% of expected, Yellow 70-90%, Red <70%) — never narrative-only colour.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `rag-thresholds` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-benefits-realization.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
